task_completion.description: Extract allocated and deleted '.txt' files to '/home/ga/Reports/Production/raw/'.

Terminal or file manager showing files named 'PROD-0001.txt', 'PROD-0002.txt', etc., inside the '/home/ga/Reports/Production/bates/' directory.

task_completion.description: Produce a pipe-delimited load file at '/home/ga/Reports/Production/load_file.csv' with the required header and content.

integrity.description: The agent used the Autopsy GUI to create the case and extract files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Autopsy application open and being interacted with, rather than just terminal commands for extraction.

integrity.description: The agent used a script to programmatically generate the Bates files and load file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a script (e.g., Python, Bash) being written or executed in a terminal or text editor to perform the renaming, hashing, and CSV generation.

integrity.description: The load file contains actual MD5 hashes and file sizes, not placeholder or dummy text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The load file contents show valid 32-character hexadecimal MD5 hashes and numeric file sizes, rather than copy-pasted dummy values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The case name must be 'EDiscovery_Smith_v_Corp' and case number 'CIV-2024-882'. The disk image is located at '/home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd'. Extracted raw files should be in '/home/ga/Reports/Production/raw/'. Bates numbered files should be in '/home/ga/Reports/Production/bates/' starting with 'PROD-0001.txt'. The load file must be at '/home/ga/Reports/Production/load_file.csv'.
